message:
Running command: # CTS (Clock Tree Synthesis) step 31! After: post-CTS repair, routing (big), fill, GDS.
# CTS for 90K cells: 5-20 min. Routing: 1-4h. Then fill+GDS: 30-60 min.
# Keep monitoring.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300  # 5 min

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

# Max wire length 6884um. After: post-CTS STA, detailed placement, repair, routing.
# Continue 2-min monitoring.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 120

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out

# After post-CTS STA: detailed placement, repair, routing, fill, GDS.
# Routing (TritonRoute) is the long remaining step.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 120

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done
